analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet denounces Pompeo’s remarks on China/CPC as absurd lies rooted in a Cold War, zero-sum mentality, claims they misrepresent history and reality, and asserts US attempts to contain China will fail, citing People's Daily 'fact check.' Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Yes. The tweet portrays US politicians (Pompeo) as hostile, deceitful, driven by Cold War/zero-sum mindset, and attempting to contain China, casting the West/US as antagonistic and immoral toward China. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — No explicit framing of China’s cooperative, law-abiding or multilateral benevolence; focus is on rejecting US accusations. CH3 (China has an epic history) — No. Though it mentions misrepresenting history, it does not narrate China’s historical resilience or epic adversity. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Partially implied defense of CPC against lies, but no substantive advocacy of China’s political system or values; not sufficient. CH5 (The government of the CCP succeeds) — Implicit confidence that containment will fail suggests China’s strength, but no concrete claims of governance success or development achievements. CH6 (China is interesting culturally) — No. Conclusion: Only CH1 is clearly promoted.
